title: Bind OMO-lite stage dispatch to repo-local OpenCode execution and artifacts
summary: Add a runner that turns stage dispatch payloads into reusable artifact bundles and can execute Codex stages through repo-local OpenCode/OMO configuration.
goal: Move Homecook OMO-lite from helper-only supervision into a direct Codex stage execution path with persisted dispatch artifacts.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint scripts/omo-lite-run-stage.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/omo-lite-sync-status.mjs tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint scripts/omo-lite-run-stage.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/omo-lite-sync-status.mjs tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts

out_of_scope: automatic GitHub PR creation or merge actions
open_questions: Should future stages persist a human/Claude handoff artifact with a stricter schema than prompt.md
When should stage execution auto-sync artifact paths back into workflow-v2 notes
